goals: Explore available unit conversion categories to understand what measurement types are supported
Investigate specific unit categories relevant to governance and policy work (area, data, length)
Perform practical conversions needed for comparing international standards and policy metrics

user_agent_config.personality: Analytical and methodical. Prefers structured information gathering before making decisions. Values precision and international standards.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands governance policy and international relations well. Unfamiliar with specific unit conversion tools or APIs. Knows metric and imperial systems exist but may need guidance on specific conversions.

end_condition: The user has explored available conversion capabilities and successfully performed the unit conversions needed for their policy comparison work.
